title: Repurposed Structures - Biome Makeover Compat
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and Biome Makeover. The various mansions in RS will be changed to be in Biome Makeover's style and uses some of their blocks as well! Can you explore and fight your way through all these mansions?



**Forge:**

- Biome Makeover mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/biome-makeover

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge

 

**Fabric:**

- Biome Makeover mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/biome-makeover

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-fabric


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CGuO1TRR/images/a62c604fbc18dbb36e72b12f3f697e5199fc90f1.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CGuO1TRR/images/a62c604fbc18dbb36e72b12f3f697e5199fc90f1.png)


Note for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/drp-global-datapack
